benchmarks.name: cond_select_dense
benchmarks.description: Pure isolated compare/select diamonds over aligned staged arrays
benchmarks.hypothesis: Isolates COND_SELECT lowering without rotate or byte-recompose interference

benchmarks.name: extract_dense
benchmarks.description: Pure packed-word bitfield extraction over aligned u64 staged input
benchmarks.hypothesis: Isolates BITFIELD_EXTRACT lowering using native loads and constant shift-and-mask fields

benchmarks.name: endian_swap_dense
benchmarks.description: Pure aligned load plus byte-swap sequence over staged u32 input
benchmarks.hypothesis: Isolates ENDIAN_FUSION lowering by using native aligned loads followed by __builtin_bswap32

benchmarks.name: rotate_dense
benchmarks.description: Pure register-resident ARX rounds over native-loaded seed words
benchmarks.hypothesis: Isolates ROTATE lowering by keeping the hot path entirely in registers after seed loads

benchmarks.name: addr_calc_stride
benchmarks.description: Pure explicit address-generation stride walk over aligned u64 values
benchmarks.hypothesis: Isolates ADDR_CALC lowering via integer-address construction followed by u64 loads

benchmarks.name: branch_flip_dense
benchmarks.description: Pure dense if/else diamonds over aligned staged u64 input
benchmarks.hypothesis: Isolates BRANCH_FLIP lowering with eight simple ALU-only diamonds repeated across 32 groups
